name: Verify CAPA Metrics
description: Validate CAPA controller and CAPI Prometheus metrics are exposed and healthy after cluster provisioning

playbooks.name: Verify CAPA Controller Metrics
playbooks.description: Validates CAPA controller metrics via Prometheus and ServiceMonitor resources

documentation.overview: This test suite validates Prometheus metrics for the CAPA controller and CAPI infrastructure. Inspired by hypershift-addon-e2e-tests metrics validation, it ensures observability is working for CAPI-provisioned ROSA HCP clusters.
prerequisites: MCE/ACM hub cluster with CAPI/CAPA configured
Prometheus/monitoring stack deployed on hub cluster
At least one ROSA HCP cluster provisioned via CAPI (recommended)

quick_start.description: Validates CAPA controller metrics are being scraped by Prometheus

expected_results: CAPA controller ServiceMonitor exists in multicluster-engine namespace
CAPA controller metrics endpoint is reachable
Key controller metrics are non-zero (reconcile counts, queue depth)
